channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 2 Houston overcomes J'Wan Roberts' ankle injury to beat Colorado 77-69 in Big 12 quarterfinal
item.description: Emanuel Sharpe scored 19 points before fouling out, and No. 2 Houston overcame an injury to veteran forward J’Wan Roberts in the second half to beat Colorado 77-68 on Thursday and advance to the semifinals of the Big 12 Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: John Feinstein, bestselling author and Washington Post sportswriter, dead at 69
item.description: John Feinstein, a bestselling author of 50 books and a longtime Washington Post sports writer and columnist, died at the age of 69 Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jones scores 28 as No. 25 Marquette rallies past Xavier 89-87 in Big East quarterfinal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Kam Jones scored 28 points and No. 25 Marquette rallied past Xavier 89-87 on Thursday in the Big East Tournament quarterfinals. After trailing by 14 early in the second half, the fifth-seeded Golden Eagles (23-9) took the lead for good at 81-80 on Jones' layup with 1:16 remaining.
item.dc:creator: EVERETT MERRILL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC announces measures to discourage fans from engaging in homophobic chant
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — San Diego FC will use pre-match and in-stadium messaging, enhanced security measures and strong enforcement of policies to discourage fans from engaging in what it called “discriminatory chants” at home matches, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: John Feinstein, bestselling author and one of country's foremost sports writers, dies at 69
item.description: John Feinstein, one of the country’s foremost sports writers and the author of numerous bestselling books, has died unexpectedly, according to his brother, Robert Feinstein.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Caitlin Clark supports boyfriend's Butler basketball team in MSG appearance for Big East Tournament
item.description: Before taking on her second WNBA campaign, Caitlin Clark was spotted at Madison Square Garden supporting her boyfriend Connor McCaffrey's Butler Bulldogs in the Big East Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Injuries to freshman star Cooper Flagg, Maliq Brown hit at inopportune time for No. 1 Duke
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Cooper Flagg went airborne to snag a rebound in his first ACC Tournament game when Duke's freshman star landed awkwardly and crashed to the court, holding his left ankle and writhing in pain.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jordan Spieth shows there's rarely a dull moment with his game at The Players
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Jordan Spieth wouldn't mind a boring day at the office. Those are rare with him, and Thursday at The Players Championship was no exception.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The growth of women's sports is spurring a building boom
item.description: While it might not be the flashiest way to chart the rapid growth of women's professional sports, a building boom is showing that investors are paying attention. There's already a dedicated women's soccer stadium in the National Women's Soccer League and another one is planned.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC will take more action against discriminatory fan chants
item.description: San Diego FC has announced additional steps to limit discriminatory behavior by fans, including anti-discriminatory messaging, extra security, and enforcement of sanctions.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, Fox 5

item.title: Rays 'cannot move forward' with new ballpark deal, owner says
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will not be getting a new stadium in St. Petersburg under the existing deal, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers spotted strolling on beach while NFL awaits free agent decision
item.description: Aaron Rodgers, whose free agency decision the entire NFL world is waiting on, was spotted strolling on a beach seemingly content as he stared off into the distance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohtani's Tokyo airport arrival hidden from fans hoping to catch a glimpse of Japanese star
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Hundreds of fans at Tokyo’s Haneda Airport, who lined up 10 deep and hoped to catch a glimpse of Shohei Ohtani as he arrived on Thursday, saw nothing of the Los Angeles Dodgers superstar.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WADE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego St. women beat Wyoming in triple OT for MWC title
item.description: Veronica Sheffey scored 24 points and Cali Clark recorded a double-double and fourth-seeded San Diego State clinched the automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament beating No. 2 seed Wyoming 72-68 in triple overtime of the Mountain West Conference Tournament on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Friendly Freshmen; Aztecs Basketball Pharaoh Compton and Taj DeGourville hold lifelong bond
item.description: Aztecs freshmen-duo Pharaoh Compton and Taj Degourville's friendship goes back longer than you think.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Russell Wilson expected to meet with 2 quarterback-needy teams as NFL free agency continues: reports
item.description: Russell Wilson is expected to meet with the Cleveland Browns and New York Giants, two teams needing a QB, as his NFL free agency journey continues ahead of Year 14.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bills to re-sign Hamlin. Buffalo also adds defensive tackle Ogunjobi to 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Safety Damar Hamlin is returning to Buffalo, and the Bills also continued restocking their defensive front by agreeing to sign tackle Larry Ogunjobi on Wednesday. The Bills announced reaching an agreement to sign Hamlin to a one-year contract.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Virginia track athlete facing assault charge after baton strike she said was accidental
item.description: Alaila Everett said it was an accident but court records show she is now facing a potential assault and battery charge.
item.dc:creator: Kenzie Finch, NewsNation

item.title: Super-sectional Monday: A look at Chicagoland prep boys basketball teams playing for trip to IHSA State Tournament
item.description: One of the best days of the Illinois high school sports calendar has arrived. It's super-sectional Monday for boys basketball.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Rugby: Cathedral Catholic 28, La Costa Canyon 17
item.description:
The High School Boys Rugby Championship was held in Del Mar as the Cathedral Catholic Dons hosted the La Costa Canyon Mavericks.
It was the Dons who came out victorious, defeated La Costa Canyon by a score of 28-17, to win their 5th straight Rugby Championship.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Kenwood Academy girls basketball team brings IHSA Class 4A state title back to South Side for 1st time in program history
item.description: NOTE: The attached video is from a feature story by GN Sports' Josh Frydman on the Kenwood Academy boys and girls basketball programs prior to the IHSA State Girls Basketball Tournament over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Bills release Von Miller in salary cap-saving move: Report
item.description: The move frees up at least $8.4 million in salary cap space, which comes close to matching how much the team was projected to be over the limit.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy released after Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nikola Jokic makes NBA history with 30-20-20 triple-double in Nuggets' OT win over Suns
item.description: The three-time NBA MVP had the league's first 30-20-20 triple-double in the Denver Nuggets' 149-141 overtime victory over the Phoenix Suns on Friday night. Jokic had 31 points, 21 rebounds and a career-high 22 assists.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KELLY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bay FC coaching staff facing investigation after complaints over head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Days after Bay FC unveiled renderings for its slick new training facility on Treasure Island, the team is facing more troubling allegations regarding its backroom staff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4
